notes: Foundation operating the Global Legal Entity Identifier System (LEI). LEIs are unique 20-character codes assigned to legal entities involved in financial transactions. LEI registry data is FREE and publicly available; reference materials are mostly free.

data.notes: ISO 17442-based. LEI registry data is free public reference data. GLEIF reference materials are mostly free. Notable: 2 million+ LEIs issued globally; required for OTC derivatives reporting in many jurisdictions.
